title: ExtraIncendium
description: A Compatibility Add-On for ExtraVanilla and Incendium.
body:
**ExtraIncendium** is a compatiblity add-on for ***Kazzmon's ExtraVanilla*** and ***Stardust Labs' Incendium*** datapacks.

---

This add-on aims to resolve conflicts with:
- Mob Behavior
- Mob Loot Tables
- Datapack Translations
- Custom Item Textures

---

This add-on requires both [ExtraVanilla](https://modrinth.com/datapack/kazzmons-extravanilla) and [Incendium](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/incendium-nether-expansion/). This also requires their respective **Resource Packs** to fix all the conflicts stated above. Project dependencies linked in the versions tab.

To setup the Datapacks and Resource Packs, you'll need to follow this order:

- **ExtraIncendium Add-On**
- **ExtraVanilla**
- **Incendium**

This is how it should look like when setting up the Datapacks in a Singleplayer World, or the Resource Packs in the Options. **Make sure to download the included ExtraIncendium Resource Pack as well!**
